meaning: n.禁止出入港口,禁运vt.禁止(船只)出入港口,禁运
examples: The embargo would only hurt innocent civilians.
The United Nations imposed an arms embargo against the country.
The ship was impounded under the terms of the UN trade embargo.
Transfer embargo-hit Pompey could find out on Thursday whether they can come out of administration.
The European Union also approved an embargo on Iranian oil that goes into effect in July.
